title: Midas Hunger
description: A simple mod that adds new golden food items
body:
The main purpose of this mod is to make the not-so-useful food items useful i.e. Beetroot now has a use, turtle farms can now be used to craft golden turtle eggs; furthermore, both the golden chorus fruit and the golden poisonous potato have interesting effects that can't be obtained through potions.

![Infographic](https://i.imgur.com/7Sp9z4m.png)
